docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LARRY JAMES FREITAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP DBA HOMRISE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FREITAS, LARRY JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP DBA HOMRISE $1,159.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 INTEREST, $1,096.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,455.00, PLUS $5000.00 GENERAL DAMAGES. TOTAL $7455.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FREITAS, LARRY JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP DBA HOMRISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREITAS, LARRY JAMES ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $200.00 SERVED MAR-25-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP DBA HOMRISE
REMARK:EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FREITAS, LARRY JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP DBA HOMRISE $6,159.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,096.00 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,455.00, PRINCIPAL AMOUNT INCLUDES $5000.00 FOR GENERAL DAMAGES. TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,455.00. THIS JUDGMENT IS NUNC PRO TUNC TO APRIL 28, 2025. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
